# LLM Wiki Maintenance
## When to Use
Use when the user asks to organize llm-wiki, update the index, restructure research notes, clean wikilinks, localize images, or run a maintenance verification pass.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use when the user only asks to clip one URL or PDF into raw notes; use clip for initial capture.
## Required Inputs
The llm-wiki vault path, target note scope, source notes, or maintenance objective.
## Workflow
1. Locate canonical raw notes and related index entries.
2. Normalize frontmatter, wikilinks, assets, and backlinks.
3. Update layered notes and scoped index references.
4. Run a scoped verifier and report remaining issues.
